## Type

## Safety

- [ ] This change does not delete, move, or rewrite real game installation directories.
- [ ] Destructive-adjacent actions require explicit confirmation and protection backups where appropriate.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and fixtures do not include private keys, tokens, passwords, or unredacted personal paths.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` or `cargo fmt`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Browser smoke, if UI changed
- [ ] Desktop smoke, if launch/package/app-data behavior changed
